reviews.review_msg: Professor Moens treats his student with utmost respect which is often not the case with other profs. His marking is a little on the hard side but is always available for extra help. pol 445 was very informative and classes were structured around an informal discussion setting which i found very refreshing. SFU needs more like him!

Ad: He analyzed historical political events from a more individual perspective. He is very flexible during the class and he is free to answer all questions.
Something which can be improved; the class format can be improved
